title: Saro's Region Protector
description: Simple flag-based region protection with whitelist
body: ![Saro's Region Protector Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Region_Protector_Mod/MP_SarosRegionProtectorMod_header.webp) Saro's Region Protector is a comprehensive region protection mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1. It allows players to create protected regions in the world where various actions can be controlled through a flexible flag system. ![Saro's Region Protector Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Region_Protector_Mod/MP_SarosRegionProtectorMod_description.webp) - **Simple Region Creation**: Select two corners with the Protector tool to define your region - **Granular Protection Control**: 16 different protection flags to fine-tune what is allowed in your region - **User Management**: Add trusted players who can bypass protection - **Visual Selection**: See your selection in real-time before confirming - **Multi-Dimension Support**: Create regions in any dimension - **Server-Side Storage**: All regions are saved server-side and synchronized to clients ## Getting Started ### Creating a Region 1. Craft or obtain the Protector item (found in the Tools & Utilities creative tab) 2. Right-click on a block to select the first corner of your region 3. Right-click on another block to select the second corner 4. Enter a name for your region in the GUI that appears 5. Configure protection flags and add trusted users as needed 6. Click "Save" to create your protected region ### Managing Regions - **Edit an Existing Region**: Right-click on a block within the region with the Protector tool - **Edit Protection Flags**: Shift + Right-click on a block within the region with the Protector tool - **Add Trusted Users**: In the region management GUI, click "Toggle Users" and add player names ![Saro's Region Protector Flags](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Region_Protector_Mod/MP_SarosRegionProtectorMod_flags.webp) Saro's Region Protector offers 16 different protection flags to control what actions are allowed in your regions: ### General Flags - BUILD: Controls whether blocks can be mined or placed - INTERACT: Controls whether doors, levers, etc. can be used ### Specific Flags - BLOCK_BREAK: Controls whether blocks can be broken - BLOCK_PLACE: Controls whether blocks can be placed - DAMAGE_ANIMALS: Controls whether players can harm friendly animals - CHEST_ACCESS: Controls whether inventories can be accessed - RIDE: Controls whether vehicles (including animals) can be mounted - PVP: Controls whether player versus player combat is permitted - SLEEP: Controls whether sleeping in a bed is permitted - RESPAWN_ANCHORS: Controls whether respawn anchors can be activated - TNT: Controls whether TNT detonation or block damage is permitted - VEHICLE_PLACE: Controls whether vehicles (boats, minecarts) can be placed - VEHICLE_DESTROY: Controls whether vehicles can be destroyed - LIGHTER: Controls whether flint and steel or a fire charge can be used - ITEM_FRAME: Controls whether item frames can be interacted with - FIREWORK_DAMAGE: Controls whether fireworks can deal damage to entities When a flag is set to **true**, the corresponding action is **blocked** for non-trusted players. When set to **false**, the action is allowed for all players. ![Saro's Region Protector Supported](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Region_Protector_Mod/MP_SarosRegionProtectorMod_supported.webp) Saro's Region Protector is designed for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1. It should be compatible with most other mods, but conflicts may occur with other region protection or claim mods. [![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Region_Protector_Mod/MP_SarosRegionProtectorMod_promo.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php") **Project Support & Usage** **Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner. **Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
